title: Example source record for RunHaven runtime pattern
purpose: Example project-owned source record for architecture claims that should guide agents and maintainers.
reviewCadence: Review before runtime-boundary, workspace, network, auth, or release changes.

claims.claim: RunHaven uses Apple `container run` around a selected workspace and isolated agent home volume.
claims.evidence: `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` explains the runtime pattern and credential boundary.
claims.limitations: Live Apple `container` behavior must still be verified when runtime claims change.

retireWhen: Retire this example when real source records are added or a stronger source ledger replaces example records.
notes: Project-owned source records are separate from any product-level public source ledger.
